description.tr: Phone, email and office hours—for operational pricing use the quote form; for shipment status use the lookup page.
description.en: Phone, email and office hours—for operational pricing use the quote form; for shipment status use the lookup page.

keyword.tr: Hanbros UK customer care phone, London office email, hanbroscargo.co.uk contact channels
keyword.en: Hanbros UK customer care phone, London office email, hanbroscargo.co.uk contact channels

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Contact us by email or phone. UK and Turkey offices operate across different time zones.
text.en:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Contact us by email or phone. UK and Turkey offices operate across different time zones.
